name: Inca Empire
description: The Inca Empire was the largest empire in pre-Columbian America, stretching along the western coast of South America. Despite lacking writing, wheeled vehicles, or iron tools, the Inca built an extraordinary civilization with a road network spanning over 40,000 km, sophisticated agricultural terracing, and monumental stone architecture. Their engineering achievements at sites like Machu Picchu continue to astound modern observers.
